summary: Iteration 6 verification: (a) video compression for GitHub <100MB push, (b) cookie banner + /cookies page, (c) Contact nav removal. All 13 backend pytest cases and 10 frontend Playwright steps PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: NAV_LINKS in /app/frontend/src/data/content.js is now 4 items (Home, Journeys, Gallery, About) - confirmed clean.
Navbar.jsx iterates by index against NAV_LINKS only, so any stale nav.4.* DB rows are inert (as noted by main agent). No action needed.
/contact route is still mounted (Contact.jsx lazy import) - direct URL access works (returns 200), and the Get In Touch CTA still links there.
CookieBanner correctly persists via localStorage key 'oww:cookies' with values 'accepted'/'declined'; reset via /cookies clears + reloads.
Footer renders the 4-item nav (no Contact) and a footer-cookies-link to /cookies.
test_credentials: Not required - all flows tested are public.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 confirmed: all 3 compressed videos are valid MP4s (ftypisom headers), all under 100MB (15M/21M/63M), and serve with correct Content-Length over /api/uploads/gallery/<file>. No file under /app/backend/uploads exceeds 100MB so GitHub push should now succeed. Cookie banner UX + /cookies page + footer-cookies-link all verified end-to-end. Desktop + mobile nav show exactly Home/Journeys/Gallery/About; Get In Touch CTA preserved and links to /contact. /contact route still accessible (200) so existing inbound links keep working.
rca of the issue: Prior failure: 'Failed to push to GitHub' caused by 3 mp4 files in /app/backend/uploads/gallery >100MB. Mitigation (already applied by main agent): the 3 videos were re-encoded in place; verified post-fix sizes (14.7MB, 21.4MB, 63.2MB) and ftyp MP4 validity; verified backend serves them at /api/uploads/gallery/<file> with matching Content-Length. Total recursive scan of /app/backend/uploads found ZERO files >100MB, so the git push should now succeed.
